CGI Video Falsely Peddled As Iran Striking US Navy Warship BOOM found clear signs of manipulation in the video, including a visible cursor and a U.S. flag that abruptly appears mid-attack,
Old Video Of Flying Crows Viral As Recent Scene From Israel BOOM found that the video has been available online since 2024, with posts identifying the location as Texas in the US.
Videos From Karnataka And Rajasthan Falsely Shared As Delhi's Uttam Nagar BOOM found that both viral videos are unrelated to Uttam Nagar and originate from Karnataka and Rajasthan.
Video Of Destroyed, Abandoned US Fighter Jets Is AI-Generated A test using Google’s AI detector tool SynthID confirmed that the video was made using Google AI.
2018 Riyadh Drone Video Falsely Shared As Recent Gunfire At Saudi Palace BOOM found that the viral video is from April 2018 and shows a drone being shot down near the Riyadh palace.
Unrelated Video Shared As Police Action In Delhi's Uttam Nagar During Eid The video shows a lathi-charge incident from Baran district of Rajasthan in February 2026.
Old Submarine Video From Gibraltar Falsely Shared As UK Entering Iran War BOOM found that the video is from January 2026 and shows the HMS Anson docked in Gibraltar, not the Arabian Sea.
Video Of Al Jazeera Anchor Resigning Over Iran War Coverage Is AI-Generated BOOM found no such broadcast on Al Jazeera, and AI tools and visual inconsistencies suggest the video is synthetic
Old Iran Earthquake Video Falsely Shared As Recent Nuclear Testing Tremors BOOM found that the viral video is from a 2021 earthquake in southern Iran.
Unrelated Videos Shared As Iran’s Strike On Qatar’s Ras Laffan LNG Hub The visuals depict Iran’s attacks on Oman and Saudi Arabia, not the missile attack on Qatar’s Ras Laffan LNG hub.
'CCTV Footage' Claiming To Show Netanyahu Dying In A Bunker Is AI-Generated BOOM found that the viral video is AI-generated and no such footage was aired by Al Jazeera.
Unrelated Video Shared As Panic In Israel Over Iranian Missiles BOOM found that the video is from Daytona Beach in Florida, US, and captures panic among beachgoers in March this year.
AI, Old Videos Falsely Linked to Iranian Strikes On Tel Aviv BOOM found that two videos are synthetic and likely AI-generated, while another predates the conflict and is from Hong Kong.
Old UAE Fire Video Falsely Linked to Dubai Airport Drone Attack BOOM found that the viral video is from August 2020, when a fire broke out at Ajman Market in the UAE.

Deepfakes Of Tharoor, Ex Army Chief Target India's Defence And Diplomacy Strategies Results from multiple AI detector models confirm that both videos of Shashi Tharoor and ex-COAS Gen Manoj Pande show signs of AI manipulation.
Video Of PM Modi Announcing Free LPG Cylinders Is A Deepfake BOOM found that the voiceover in the video is artificially generated using AI.
AI Video Viral As An Iranian Attack On Indian Oil Tanker BOOM analysed the video using AI detection tools like DeepFake-O-Meter and Hive Moderation which flagged the video as AI-generated.
Unrelated Videos Falsely Linked To Iranian Strikes On Tel Aviv BOOM found that two viral videos are old and unrelated, while another is AI-generated.

US–Iran Crisis: Deepfakes Of Indian Leaders Supporting Israel Surface Amid the US-Israel conflict with Iran, several deepfakes targeting Indian leaders have surfaced, appearing to show the Indian government taking Israel’s side against Iran.
2020 US Navy Ship Fire Shared As Iranian Attack On USS Lincoln BOOM found that the video is from a fire incident aboard the USS Bonhomme Richard in July 2020.
Photo Of Iranian Missile With Epstein Message Is Fake The image pre-dates the ongoing United States-Israel war on Iran and is likely AI-generated.
Video Of MEA Spokesperson Backing Israel, Threatening Iran Is A Deepfake Tests with multiple AI detector tools confirmed that the viral video contains AI-generated visuals.

Video Showing US Soldiers Captured By Iran Is AI-Generated An analysis using AI detection tool confirmed that the video was synthetically created.

Revisiting Dasgaon, where a 23-year-old drank water from a well and broke a social order Months before the Mahad Satyagraha of 1927, a similar symbolic act by the people of Dasgaon in Maharashtra took place. Now, 100 years later, the people of Dasgaon have forgotten the event
